title: Bacofoil SafeLoc Double Seal Food and Freezer Bags – 108 x Small Safeloc Bags
features: Bacofoil Safeloc Food and Freezer Small Bags, 108 Bags
Strong and reusable. Easy Open Tabs & Double Seal Closure
Easy to fill thanks to flexible stand-alone base
Protection against freezer burn – Resealable. Perfect for individual portioning of food – Easy open tabs
Made with 70% recycled resources and BPA Free
description: Bacofoil SafeLoc Double Seal Food and Freezer Bags with Easy Open tabs are a perfect for households wanting to cook, store and freeze in large quantities. They’re easy to use and protect food from freezer burn. They are ideal for households wanting to cook, store and freeze in large quantities. The Bacofoil SafeLoc Double Seal Bags also have a stand-alone base making them easier to fill and are made from extra thick film to prevent leakages, tearing and Freezer burn. They’re also extremely durable and reusable, so they’ll last you a long time, and they’re now made with 70% recycled and renewable raw materials which makes them better for the environment.
